text: The rate limit is 50 requests per minute.
source_note: Verbal quote from sales call, not in contract

text: Auth tokens expire after 3600 seconds.
source_note: Inferred from log timestamps, spec not checked

text: The batch endpoint accepts up to 100 items per request.
source_note: Mentioned by support rep, not in official docs

text: Webhook events are delivered within 5 seconds.
source_note: Observed in testing under low load, not measured at scale

text: The API guarantees 99.9% uptime for the production endpoint.
source_note: From integration guide, not reflected in SLA attachment

text: Pagination cursors are valid for 10 minutes.
source_note: Inferred from cursor-expired errors after inactivity, docs silent

text: We have 20 concurrent connection slots for REST calls.
source_note: Account manager email, not in portal or contract

text: Idempotency keys are retained for 24 hours.
source_note: Stack Overflow answer from two years ago, no official docs

text: The maximum payload size for the upload endpoint is 10 MB.
source_note: Developer forum post, not confirmed with vendor

text: OAuth token refresh takes approximately 200 milliseconds.
source_note: One timing test under ideal conditions, not repeated

text: The retry window for failed webhook deliveries is 72 hours.
source_note: Sales call mention, contract says best-effort only

text: The GraphQL depth limit for nested queries is 7 levels.
source_note: Encountered 400 error at level 8 once, not documented

text: The burst allowance is 3x the sustained rate limit.
source_note: Inferred from brief observation of 429 patterns, no docs

text: The sandbox environment resets every 24 hours.
source_note: Mentioned during onboarding call, no written confirmation

text: API responses average 120 milliseconds under normal load.
source_note: Single load test run, network conditions not controlled

text: The memory leak grows at 2 MB per 1000 requests.
source_note: Visual estimate from Grafana dashboard, no profiler run

text: The race condition triggers at 8 or more concurrent writes.
source_note: Threshold from non-deterministic load tests, could be lower

text: We lost 0.3% of writes during the outage window.
source_note: Estimated from log gaps, full record audit not performed

text: Disk will be exhausted in 6 weeks at the current growth rate.
source_note: Linear extrapolation from Grafana, actual usage may accelerate

text: The CPU spike peaks at 85% during batch job execution.
source_note: Single observation during one batch run, not repeated

text: The connection pool exhaustion happens after 200 simultaneous users.
source_note: Observed in one staging test, production load differs

text: Query p99 latency is 450 milliseconds after the regression.
source_note: Five-minute Datadog window, may not reflect steady state

text: The deadlock cycle involves 3 tables in the payment schema.
source_note: Hypothesis from log inspection, not confirmed by tracing

text: Queue depth reaches 50,000 messages before the consumer recovers.
source_note: Eyeballed from CloudWatch, not from a profiler

text: The auth service returns 503 errors for about 2 minutes during restarts.
source_note: Observed in one restart cycle in staging, production varies

text: The N+1 query adds 300 milliseconds to every user profile load.
source_note: Rough calculation from query count times average duration

text: Heap dumps show 15% of retained objects are from the session cache.
source_note: One heap dump analysis, cache contents change over time

text: The retry storm generates 40 requests per second against the downstream service.
source_note: Back-of-envelope from retry interval and upstream count

text: Log aggregation is 4 minutes behind real time under high load.
source_note: Measured once by comparing timestamps, not averaged

text: The cold start penalty for the Lambda function is 1.5 seconds.
source_note: From AWS X-Ray trace, single cold start measurement

text: Each database shard will handle 500,000 user records.
source_note: Capacity estimate based on current growth rate projection

text: The event bus supports 10,000 messages per second per topic.
source_note: Kafka benchmark from a different team's use case, not our workload

text: Cache hit rate for product catalog queries is 95%.
source_note: Vendor benchmark on a different dataset, not our product catalog

text: The service mesh adds 3 milliseconds of latency per hop.
source_note: Istio documentation example, our config differs

text: Read replicas can serve 80% of all database queries.
source_note: Estimated from current read/write ratio in production logs

text: The CDN reduces origin traffic by 70% for static assets.
source_note: CloudFront case study for a different type of application

text: The message queue guarantees delivery within 100 milliseconds.
source_note: Sales material, SLA says best-effort delivery only

text: Auto-scaling from 2 to 20 instances takes 45 seconds.
source_note: One scale-out event observed in staging, not production

text: GraphQL reduces the average response payload size by 40%.
source_note: Calculated from one query type, not representative across all endpoints

text: Log aggregation storage costs drop by 60% with compression enabled.
source_note: Vendor whitepaper benchmark, actual ratio depends on log format

text: The GDPR response window for data deletion requests is 30 days.
source_note: Internal legal memo, external counsel not yet reviewed

text: Our cloud provider achieves SOC 2 Type II certification.
source_note: Listed on vendor marketing page, certificate not received or reviewed

text: Encryption keys must be rotated every 90 days under our security policy.
source_note: Copied from a template policy, formal approval not obtained

text: PHI data covered under HIPAA must be retained for 6 years.
source_note: General HIPAA guidance, state law may require longer retention

text: Breach notification must be sent within 72 hours of discovery.
source_note: GDPR Article 33 figure, jurisdiction-specific rules not checked

text: The DPA with our EU processor covers sub-processing under standard clauses.
source_note: Processor's form DPA, legal has not signed off on the clauses

text: Passwords must be hashed with at least 10,000 PBKDF2 iterations.
source_note: NIST draft guidance, final recommendation differs

text: Access logs must be retained for 1 year per our enterprise agreement.
source_note: Internal policy, client contract may require 2 years

text: Coordinated vulnerability disclosure requires 90-day public notice.
source_note: Google Project Zero default, not our policy or the researcher's commitment

text: Contractors require Level 2 background checks for production access.
source_note: Internal HR draft, enterprise contract clause may differ
